## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] [CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md) updated if architecture or invariants changed
- [ ] [README.md](../README.md) feature list updated if user-visible behavior changed
- [ ] [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md) updated under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] Manual UI walkthrough done (for frontend changes)
